Metadata.title: Freelance Web Developer for React, Next.js Websites | Oorathai P.
Metadata.description: Freelance web developer building fast React and Next.js websites, SEO-friendly web applications, and Canva website templates for small businesses and creators.

Hero.badge: Freelance Web Developer · React / Next.js · 4+ Years
Hero.description: Freelance web development for businesses that need fast, SEO-friendly websites, scalable web applications, and practical frontend systems built with React and Next.js.
Hero.feature_1_desc: Designing resilient codebases that prioritize modularity, ensuring technical decisions support rapid scaling and team growth.
Hero.feature_2_desc: Systematically reducing technical debt and enhancing system speed, resulting in measurable improvements in user experience.
Hero.feature_3_desc: Tackling complex challenges with the right technological choices, specialized in high-demand web platform architectures.

Services.title: Web Development Services
Services.description: Freelance React and Next.js web development for new websites, frontend systems, API integrations, and performance-focused improvements.

item1.title: React / Next.js Website Development
item1.description: Building modern websites from scratch using Next.js and React, with a focus on speed, SEO, responsive design, and scalable component structures.

item2.title: Large-scale Frontend
item2.description: Architecting robust frontend foundations for complex web platforms such as E-commerce portals and Concert Ticketing systems.

item3.title: API Integration & Fixes
item3.description: Fixing bugs and seamlessly connecting your frontend with complex backend REST APIs, reducing technical debt.

Work.title: Selected Projects
Work.description: A selection of projects where I led frontend execution, solving complex requirements.

p1.title: KONticket — Concert Ticketing
p1.challenge: The system needed to support huge traffic spikes during high-demand sales periods without failing during the booking process.
p1.solution: Built ticket browsing, seat selection, and booking flows using React and Next.js. Connected frontend with backend services utilizing React Query / SWR for real-time synchronization.
p1.result: Stable operation for large ticket events.

p2.title: Unified Admin & Platform
p2.challenge: A synchronized platform ecosystem requiring an admin dashboard and a high-traffic customer-facing site.
p2.solution: Built reusable UI components across different parts of the platform using Nuxt.js/Vue.js. Collaborated closely with Laravel backend devs to integrate APIs.

p3.title: B2B E-Commerce
p3.challenge: B2B commerce platform focused on data-heavy product catalogs and complex procurement procedures.
p3.solution: Created user interfaces addressing large volumes of data using Nuxt.js and SCSS. Optimized ordering and product management processes.

About.para1: Oorathai Phanlakhon — I am a Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience specializing in the React Ecosystem (Next.js, TypeScript).
About.para2: I have been part of core teams building highly concurrent systems like concert ticketing sites. My fundamental goal is delivering clean code and providing the smoothest user experience possible.

item1.question: How will I receive the product?
item1.answer: After checkout, you will receive a receipt and secure access to your files or product page. You can return to your purchase anytime through your customer account.

item2.question: Can I use these products for client or business projects?
item2.answer: Most products are created for practical personal, freelance, or small business workflows. Please check the product detail page for any product-specific usage notes.

item3.question: What if I have a question before or after buying?
item3.answer: You can contact me through the channels on this website. I am happy to clarify whether a product fits your workflow before you purchase.
